title: Aotearoa Data Explorer changes by date | Stats NZ
content:
## Aotearoa Data Explorer changes by date
28 April 2026, 10:45am
Ann ouncements about revisions, corrections, and new series in Aotearoa Data Explorer.
April 2026 March 2026 January 2026 December 2025 November 2025 October 2025

### 28 April 2026: Productivity statistics: 1978–2025
We have updated data in the following table to include the labour income and capital income data for 2024 year.
- Industry Productivity Statistics ANZSIOC06
Productivity statistics is available in ADE under Economy > Productivity.

### 23 April 2026: Prison (sentence, remand and post-prison), community-sentence and completed community work offender population statistics
We have updated data in the following table for the 2024 calendar year.
- Annual Completed Community Work Offender Population for the latest Calendar Years (ANZSOC)
Annual Completed Community Work Offender Population statistics is available in ADE under Society > Crime and justice > Corrections.

### 16 April 2026: Agricultural production statistics: Year to June 2025
Nelson region statistics for 2025 are suppressed because the sampling error could not be calculated for this region.
See the technical notes for more information.
Agricultural production statistics is available in ADE under Environment > Agriculture.

### 9 March 2026: Estimated resident population (2023-base) tables published on 16 April 2025 − retrospective note
Data for the 2023-base estimated resident population (ERP) were published in Aotearoa Data Explorer (ADE) on 16 April 2025. While data published for different base-years remains similar, some changes to how data is published may occur, including geographic breakdowns that are published, or their related boundary changes, or how areas are grouped in tables. This may mean some tables have different breakdowns than previous base-years for the ERP.
Changes include separating tables that were available previously into smaller tables to improve accessibility and allow for more geographies to be published. For example, POPES_ERP_006 has been separated into other POPES_ERP tables and more geographies added (statistical area 3, functional urban areas, health regions and districts).
Subnational population data published annually is available in ADE under Society > Population estimates > Subnational population estimates.

### 15 January 2026: Injury statistics – work-related claims: 2024
The following table has been updated to include updated severity of injury figures.
- Table 5: All claims for work-related injury by industry and territorial authority 2009-2024(P).

### 12 December 2025: Subnational population estimates: At 30 June 2025
The following tables with local government electoral boundaries have been updated to include updated provisional population estimates at 30 June 2024, and newly published provisional population estimates at 30 June 2025. These subnational population estimates use the latest local government electoral boundaries, released on 10 December 2025.
- Subnational population estimates (TA, ward), by age and sex, at 30 June 2023-25 (2026 boundaries)
- Subnational population estimates (TA, community board), by age and sex, at 30 June 2023-25 (2026 boundaries)
- Subnational population estimates (TA, subdivision), by age and sex, at 30 June 2023-25 (2026 boundaries)
- Subnational population estimates (RC, constituency), by age and sex, at 30 June 2023-25 (2026 boundaries).

### 2 December 2025: Serious injury outcome indicators: 2000–2024
We have updated the following table to correct an error affecting work-related fatalities.
- Count of fatal and serious non-fatal injuries by sex, age group, ethnicity, cause, and severity of injury, 2000-2024.

### 11 November 2025: Iwi affiliation: 2023 Census
We have added 20 new tables with iwi affiliation data from the 2023 Census.
Search: Iwi affiliation 2023 Census By topic: 2023 Census > Iwi-Māori
Direct links to the new iwi affiliation tables
- Iwi affiliation, study participation, age, and gender for the Māori descent census usually resident population count, (RC, TALB, Health), 2013 and 2023 Censuses – CEN23_MAO_071
- Iwi affiliation and religious affiliation for the Māori descent census usually resident population count, (RC, TALB, Health), 2013 and 2023 Censuses – CEN23_MAO_077
- Iwi affiliation, individual home ownership, age, and gender for the Māori descent census usually resident population count aged 15 years and over, (RC, TALB, Health), 2013 and 2023 Censuses – CEN23_MAO_079
- Iwi affiliation, tenure of household, age, and gender for people of Māori descent in households in occupied private dwellings, (RC, TALB, Health), 2013 and 2023 Censuses – CEN23_MAO_081
- Iwi affiliation, activity limitations, age, and gender for the Māori descent census usually resident population count aged 5 years and over, (RC, TALB, Health), 2023 Census – CEN23_MAO_082
- Iwi affiliation, cigarette smoking behaviour, and gender for the Māori descent census usually resident population count aged 15 years and over, (RC, TALB, Health), 2013 and 2023 Censuses – CEN23_MAO_084
- Iwi affiliation, access to telecommunication systems, age, and gender for people of Māori descent in households in occupied private dwellings, (RC, TALB, Health), 2013 and 2023 Censuses – CEN23_MAO_085
- Iwi affiliation and usual residence five years ago summary (TALB) for the Māori descent census usually resident population count, by usual residence address (RC, TALB, Health), 2023 Census – CEN23_MAO_086
- Iwi affiliation and occupation for the employed Māori descent census usually resident population count aged 15 years and over, (RC, TALB, Health), 2013 and 2023 Censuses – CEN23_MAO_090
- Iwi affiliation, unpaid activities, and gender for the Māori descent census usually resident population count aged 15 years and over, (RC, TALB, Health), 2013 and 2023 Censuses – CEN23_MAO_094
- Iwi affiliation, work and labour force status, age, and gender for the Māori descent census usually resident population count aged 15 years and over, (RC, TALB, Health), 2013 and 2023 Censuses – CEN23_MAO_095
- Iwi affiliation, disability indicator, age, and gender for the Māori descent census usually resident population count aged 5 years and over, (RC, TALB, Health), 2023 Census – CEN23_MAO_096
- Iwi affiliation, access to basic amenities, and age for the Māori descent census usually resident population in occupied private dwellings, (RC, TALB, Health), 2023 Census – CEN23_MAO_097
- Iwi affiliation, individual's role in family nucleus, age, and gender for people of Māori descent in households in occupied private dwellings, (RC, TALB, Health), 2013 and 2023 Censuses – CEN23_MAO_108
- Iwi affiliation, number of children born, and age for the sex-at-birth female Māori descent census usually resident population count aged 15 years and over, (RC, TALB, Health), 2013 and 2023 Censuses – CEN23_MAO_110
- Iwi affiliation, dwelling type, age, and gender for the Māori descent census usually resident population in occupied dwellings, (RC, TALB, Health), 2013 and 2023 Censuses – CEN23_MAO_111
- Iwi affiliation, total household income, and age for people of Māori descent in households in occupied private dwellings, (RC, TALB, Health), 2013 and 2023 Censuses – CEN23_MAO_140
- Iwi affiliation, number of bedrooms, and number of usual residents in household for people of Māori descent in households in occupied private dwellings, (RC, TALB, Health), 2013 and 2023 Censuses – CEN23_MAO_142
- Iwi affiliation, dwelling dampness, dwelling mould, and age for the Māori descent census usually resident population in occupied private dwellings, (RC, TALB, Health), 2023 Census – CEN23_MAO_143
- Iwi affiliation, total family income, family type, and age for people of Māori descent in families in households in occupied private dwellings, (RC, TALB, Health), 2013 and 2023 Censuses – CEN23_MAO_147

### 29 October 2025: Subnational population estimates: At 30 June 2025
We have updated the following tables to include updated provisional estimates at 30 June 2024, and newly published provisional estimates at 30 June 2025.
- Subnational population estimates (Health regions and Health districts), by age and sex, at 30 June 1996-25 (2023 boundaries)
- Subnational population component changes and median age (RC, TALB), at 30 June 2018-25 (2025 boundaries)
- Subnational population estimates (RC, SA2), by age and sex, at 30 June 1996-2025 (2025 boundaries)
- Subnational population estimates (TALB, SA3, SA2), by age and sex, at 30 June 1996-2025 (2025 boundaries)
- Subnational population estimates (urban rural), by age and sex, at 30 June 1996-2025 (2025 boundaries)
- Subnational population estimates (functional urban areas), by age and sex, at 30 June 1996-2025 (2023 boundaries)
The following tables with local government electoral boundaries remain unchanged until 12 December 2025, when they will be updated to include population estimates for the latest boundaries (released on 10 December 2025).
- Subnational population estimates (TA, ward), by age and sex, at 30 June 2023-24 (2025 boundaries)
- Subnational population estimates (TA, community board), by age and sex, at 30 June 2023-24 (2025 boundaries)
- Subnational population estimates (TA, subdivision), by age and sex, at 30 June 2023-24 (2025 boundaries)
- Subnational population estimates (RC, constituency), by age and sex, at 30 June 2023-24 (2023 boundaries)

### 10 October 2025: Household Expenditure Statistics: Year ended June 2023 (HES)
We have added 2020 to 2023 data to the following tables so they now provide a complete time series.
- Household expenditure for group, subgroup and class – HES_HES_001
- Household expenditure for group and subgroup by broad region – HES_HES_002
- Household expenditure for group and subgroup by household income group – HES_HES_003
- Household expenditure for group and subgroup by number of people in household – HES_HES_004
- Household expenditure for group and subgroup by principal source of income – HES_HES_005
- Household expenditure for group and subgroup by household composition and number of dependent children – HES_HES_006
- Household expenditure for group and subgroup by tenure of household – HES_HES_007
- Aotearoa Data Explorer 29 September 2025
